name: Epic Minos Legens
effectsRaw: Upgradeable - Primary Augment (Yellow Augment Slot or Blue Augment Slot)
Yellow Augments: Standard augments provide bonuses to offensive stats, condition resistances and immunities, elemental resistances and DC spellcasting stats.
Colorless Augments: Standard augments provide bonuses to ability scores and skills. Set augments are also colorless.
Blue Augments: Standard augments provide bonuses to defensive stats, healing amplifications and Tactics DCs.
Green Augments: All Green augments are named augments.
